title: Villager Professions Plus
description: Add new professions for villagers. Sometimes with new profession stations.
body:
# Villager Professions Plus

Adds new professions to Minecraft villagers.

## Added Professions
- Netherographer
- Coppersmith

## Added Job Sites
- Netherography Table
- Coppersmith Table

## Added Trades

| Profession     | Level      | Type | Item                        | Amount | Price      |
